name: Lemon-Garlic Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all marinade ingredients in a bowl.
2. Place chicken breasts in the bowl and coat evenly with the marinade.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least one hour.
4. Preheat charcoal grill to medium heat.
5. Grill chicken over hot coals for 3-4 minutes on each side until cooked through.
6. Serve with Tomato-Basil Sauce.
